title: Indiya Naade Lyrics Moondraam Ulaga Por
stanzas:
indiya naade nee verum
neerum nilama
engal uyirin swaasam

en kangal thoongadhu
en nenjam thaangadhu
en desam maanam
thalai saaindhaal

man vaasam maaradhu
nam veeram thoorkaadhu
eppothum engal
vetri naal thaan

indiya naade nee
verum neerum nilama
engal uyirin swaasam

oru thuli uthiram
irukira varaikkum
ennuyir desathai kaakum

en desam pole
inge yethu veru ethu
enai pettra naade
unai nenjil vaithu vaazhvome

thaai naattai pole
inge yethu veru ethu
uyirum kadavulum neeye

aduthavan mannai thoda mattom
asaiyil ethiriyai vida
mattome ellaiyil
en desa kodi endrum
thaalvillai

pala mozhi inam
irunthalum desathil
onrena ingu
vaazhvome desathil
orupothum nammakulle
pirivillai

pala kodi makkal
vaazhum desam
ottrumaye engal
vettri swaasam

indiya naade nee verum
neerum nilama
engal uyirin swaasam

seo.title: Indiya Naade Lyrics Moondraam Ulaga Por
seo.description: Full Indiya Naade songs lyrics, Moondraam Ulaga Por Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Annamalai, Music: Ved Shankar, Singer(s): Shankar Mahadevan.
seo.keywords: Annamalai, Moondraam Ulaga Por, Ved Shankar, Shankar Mahadevan, Indiya Naade full lyrics, Moondraam Ulaga Por songs lyrics, Indiya Naade lyrics snippets, Indiya Naade WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Indiya Naade lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Indiya Naade?

The song is a patriotic anthem that emphasizes the spirit of resilience and dedication to one's country.

Who composed the music for Moondraam Ulaga Por?

The music for the movie was composed by Ved Shankar.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song underscores the film's themes of patriotism and sacrifice, enhancing the narrative of national pride.

When was Indiya Naade released?

The song was released on January 26, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Indiya Naade from Moondraam Ulaga Por is a stirring patriotic anthem that evokes a sense of national pride and resilience. Sung by Shankar Mahadevan, the song's powerful lyrics by Annamalai and dynamic composition by Ved Shankar inspire listeners to stand up for their country. It captures the essence of dedication and sacrifice, making it a perfect backdrop for moments of reflection and motivation. The song's energetic and motivational tone makes it suitable for celebrations and workouts, resonating with those who hold their nation close to their hearts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the powerful anthem Indiya Naade from the film Moondraam Ulaga Por, where Shankar Mahadevan's stirring vocals meet Ved Shankar's dynamic composition. This song captures the essence of patriotism and resilience, making it a standout track. Dive into the heart of India with lyrics that inspire and energize.
stanzaMeanings: India, you are just water and soil, the breath of our life.
As long as a drop of blood remains, I will protect my country with my life.
In the rain, we played and tasted the soil of our land.
We learned to walk steadily and stood up strong.
My eyes won't sleep, my heart can't bear it if my country's honor bows down.
The fragrance of our soil won't change, our bravery won't fade, it's always our victory day.
India, you are just water and soil, the breath of our life.
As long as a drop of blood remains, I will protect my country with my life.
What is like my country here? We will live with you in our hearts, the land that gave birth to me.
What is like the motherland here? You are life and God.
We won't touch another's land, we won't let the enemy win, our flag will never fall at the border.
Even with many languages and races, we live as one in this country, there is never division among us.
A country where millions live, unity is our breath of victory.
We will defeat the enemy if they come, the umbilical cord is one for us.
India, you are just water and soil, the breath of our life.
As long as a drop of blood remains, I will protect my country with my life.
In the rain, we played and tasted the soil of our land.
We learned to walk steadily and stood up strong.
